dependencies.name: openssl
dependencies.$comment: on linux we use system installed OpenSSL, as determined by vcpkg-overlays/linux-syslibs)

overrides.name: abseil
overrides.$comment: 20260107.1 breaks on compilers that don't support c++-17 so we're sticking with 20250814.1 until a buildable version is available in vcpkg, or we can update compilers in older (ubuntu bionic) builder images
